[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A group of seven anime-style girls in school uniforms stands together in a bright indoor setting while floating rounded white speech-bubble-like labels with text appear over them.

Main Subject:
The image focuses on multiple anime-style female characters posed together, each wearing a different color combination of school-style outfits and accessories, with several characters holding or standing near musical instruments.

Setting:
The scene appears to be indoors in a large, brightly lit room resembling a stage or concert hall, with many bright lights and light beams overhead and around them; the background is filled with glowing fixtures and radiating beams.

Visual Details:
Lighting is intense and colorful, with pink and purple highlights and strong backlighting creating a festive, stage-like glow. Confetti-like white shapes float across the scene. The characters have large eyes and stylized hair: one has long pink hair with a light top and blue skirt and black thigh-high boots with crisscross lacing; another has brown hair with a white shirt, blue skirt, and black knee-high boots; a girl with light blue/purple hair sits or stands close in the front, wearing a light top and dark bottoms with a short skirt and dark stockings. A central character with dark red/maroon hair holds a black and white electric guitar across her body, wearing a dark outfit with white collar details and black shoes. Another character with long blonde hair stands on the right, wearing a white shirt with a blue skirt and black thigh-high stockings, with one hand raised near her face. In the lower right foreground, a purple-haired girl in a blue top and dark skirt poses forward, with green eyes. Composition is crowded and symmetrical around the center, with characters arranged in layered depths, and the camera view is straight-on at chest-to-waist height.

Visible Text:
atha
fael
dimas
nat
hat
nad
ra hma
ar fiy
lana

caesar

Practical Summary:
The image shows several anime-style girls in coordinated school outfits posed together on a brightly lit stage-like background. Each character has text labels floating on white rounded shapes placed near them, and one character is holding an electric guitar.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

  - “l ana” appears split, but also “lana” appears clearly.
  - Bottom-right label appears as both “rana” and “raha” (same/related position).

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
